inputs.label: Portfolio Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected or historical annualized portfolio return

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected or historical annualized portfolio return
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen veya geçmiş yıllık portföy getirisi
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement annualisé attendu ou historique du portefeuille

inputs.label: Risk-Free Rate
inputs.businessContext: Current risk-free rate (e.g., 10-year government bond yield)

businessContext_i18n.en: Current risk-free rate (e.g., 10-year government bond yield)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut risksiz oran (ör. 10 yıllık devlet tahvili getirisi)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux sans risque actuel (p. ex., rendement des obligations d'État à 10 ans)

inputs.label: Portfolio Beta
inputs.businessContext: Beta coefficient of the portfolio relative to the benchmark

businessContext_i18n.en: Beta coefficient of the portfolio relative to the benchmark
businessContext_i18n.tr: Portföyün gösterge endekse göre beta katsayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Beta-Koeffizient des Portfolios relativ zur Benchmark
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient bêta du portefeuille par rapport à l'indice de référence

inputs.label: Periods per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of periods per year for returns (1 for annual, 12 for monthly). Used to annualize the ratio if returns are not annual.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of periods per year for returns (1 for annual, 12 for monthly). Used to annualize the ratio if returns are not annual.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Getiriler için yıllık dönem sayısı (yıllık için 1, aylık için 12). Getiriler yıllık değilse oranı yıllıklaştırmak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Perioden pro Jahr für Renditen (1 für jährlich, 12 für monatlich). Wird zur Annualisierung der Kennzahl verwendet, falls die Renditen nicht annualisiert sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de périodes par an pour les rendements (1 pour annuel, 12 pour mensuel). Utilisé pour annualiser le ratio si les rendements ne sont pas annuels.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
